description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, one of which mentions Rashid on the recto (perhaps the port city). Dating is 16th-century or later based on the paleography. The month Ṣafar is mention in the upper left corner of the recto but it does not appear alongside a specific year. Further examination required. For a similar accounting layout in a different hand, see: T-S AS 207.36 (PGPID 39809). MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
